overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character walking through ancient Athens at night, entering Perikles's Residence. The scene transitions from public torch-lit streets with Greek architecture into a private estate with colonnaded walkways and gardens.

scene_state.functional_zone: Athens city street approaching a gated residence

agents.ego_description: walking alongside a woman NPC through the streets of Athens toward a guarded gate entrance

notable_agents.action: woman in white dress walking alongside ego toward the gate
group of guards with torches standing at the residence entrance

large red clay pots decorating the entrance area

hexagonal stone tile pattern covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the streets of ancient Athens at night, accompanied by a woman in a white dress. The street is lined with stone buildings and large terracotta vases, approaching a monumental gated entrance guarded by soldiers holding torches.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered entrance corridor of Perikles's Residence

events.description: character passes through the gate into Perikles's Residence, transitioning from public street to private estate

agents.ego_description: passing through the guarded gate into the private residence grounds

notable_agents.action: guards holding torches, standing aside as ego passes through the gate

entered.detail: tall stone pillars supporting the entrance structure
covered walkway with wooden beams and climbing vines
high stone walls enclosing the private garden
metal stands with bright flames illuminating the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters Perikles's Residence through the monumental gate, passing guards with torches. The environment shifts from the open street to a covered entrance corridor with stone columns and high garden walls, becoming more enclosed and private.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered colonnade walkway with garden views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered colonnade, passing stone benches and burning braziers

entered.detail: stone seating along the sides of the walkway
tall slender trees visible beyond the garden walls

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a covered colonnade walkway lined with stone columns and benches. The pergola roof provides cover while burning braziers cast warm light on the stone pavement. Garden walls and cypress trees become visible as the character moves deeper into the residence.

scene_state.functional_zone: open garden courtyard with gravel paths

events.description: exiting the covered colonnade into an open garden courtyard with gravel pathways

agents.ego_description: walking through the open garden area, approaching the inner residence buildings

entered.detail: bushes with red flowers lining the garden path
open area with scattered trees and ancient buildings in the distance
ground surface changing from stone tiles to loose gravel

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into an open garden courtyard. The ground transitions from stone pavement to gravel paths surrounded by flowering bushes and cypress trees. The space opens up to reveal more of the residence grounds and distant buildings under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the public, torch-lit streets of ancient Athens into the secluded, lush gardens of Perikles's Residence. It begins with the character and a woman in a white dress walking past stone buildings and terracotta vases toward a monumental gated entrance guarded by soldiers. As they pass through the gates, the environment shifts from the open street into a more enclosed and private covered corridor defined by high garden walls and stone columns. The scene then proceeds along a covered colonnade where burning braziers cast a warm glow on the pavement and cypress trees appear beyond the architecture. Finally, the camera emerges from the walkway into an open garden courtyard, as the stone ground transitions to gravel paths surrounded by flowering bushes under the night sky.
